movie.actors: Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner, LeVar Burton
movie.plot: When the crew of the Enterprise learn of a Federation conspiracy against the inhabitants of a unique planet, Captain Picard begins an open rebellion.
movie.title: Star Trek: Insurrection
movie.writer: Gene Roddenberry (creator: "Star Trek"), Rick Berman (story), Michael Piller (story), Michael Piller (screenplay)
